changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Add GIN indexes on JSONB columns for better JSON query performance
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_dlq_event_payload_gin ON dead_letter_queue USING GIN (event_payload);

changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Add additional indexes for event correlation and user tracking
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_causation ON events (causation_id) WHERE causation_id IS NOT NULL;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_user ON events (tenant_id, user_id, timestamp DESC) WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL;

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_events_causation; DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_events_user;
